name: distortionz_coords
changelog: v1.1.4 — CHANGED: when the laser hits an entity it now reports THAT object's coords + heading (GetEntityCoords/GetEntityHeading), not the surface impact point. World surfaces still report the hit point + player heading. The laser line/marker still sit on the aim point for visual feedback; the readout/copy resolve to the object. v1.1.3 — F7 keybind toggle. v1.1.2 — panel lower. v1.1.1 — update-stream visibility fix. v1.1.0 — premium NUI + version tag. v1.0.1 — GetEntityModel crash fix. v1.0.0 — initial laser tool.
